questions.question: Why does training data strongly affect AI performance?
options: Because the model learns patterns from that data
Because the data changes the computer hardware
Because the model ignores the data completely
Because the data controls the internet connection

questions.question: Why might an AI model perform poorly in a specialized field?
options: Because AI systems cannot process information
Because the model may not have trained on that type of data
Because the model only understands mathematics
Because the internet speed is too low

questions.question: How do researchers try to reduce AI mistakes?
options: By using better data and testing systems
By making the model answer more slowly

questions.question: Why is human supervision still important when using AI?
options: Because AI systems are always perfectly accurate
Because AI can still produce incorrect information
Because AI models stop working after training
